entries.definition:
l–ʾ–l–ʾ pearls, to shine, to shimmer, to glitter, to radiate; (of
fire) to rage; (of animals, deer, in particular) to flash the tail. Of
this root, لُؤْلُؤ luʾluʾ occurs six times in the Qur’an.

لُؤْلُؤ luʾluʾ [generic noun.] pearls (55:22) يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا اللُّؤْلُؤُ
وَالْمَرْجَانُ pearls and coral come forth from both of them.
